revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required before production: (1) CRITICAL QUOTE FIX — the 18:39 'Alright.' cited as Herbert's flat close is actually Meg (speaker_0). Herbert's actual close at [18:52] is 'Alright. Thank you. Yep. Bye bye.' — update trajectory_verdict.grounded_examples[2] to use Herbert's real closing words and soften the 'no warmth' characterization accordingly. The fragile-booking conclusion remains valid on button_up gaps and no spouse check, but the specific evidence must be corrected. (2) SCHEMA REFERENCE CORRECTIONS — cherry_pick_moments[2] (08:17) should cite analysis_directives.scam_anxiety_signal as primary reference, not coaching_philosophy.empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure; cherry_pick_moments[3] (09:30) should cite coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features, not verify.interest_in_solar. Update both codex_reference fields and adjust the coaching_implication language to match the correct framework. (3) ADD TWO MISSED CHERRY_PICK MOMENTS — (a) [03:04-03:23] Herbert discloses existing solar panel on roof, triggering orphaned_flow protocol that Meg never executed (no own-vs-lease question, no company, no panel size, no system-working check); classify as protocol_violation with schema reference orphaned_flow; (b) [11:14-12:08] Meg's extended net metering explanation is the call's most sustained scope_creep instance and should be classified as scope_creep with schema reference coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline — this is more significant than the premature booking attempt already flagged. (4) HANDOFF BRIEF TONE FIX — remove the fixed-income inference from sensitive_topics_raised[1] (no transcript evidence supports it; the $700 spike was weather-driven) and soften closer_should_know to remove the prescriptive 'lead with the actual cost/savings figures immediately' directive, replacing it with context framing per handoff_brief_discipline ('Herbert has an unresolved cost question he raised four times — closer should be prepared to address it early').
